NewDelm,fluanNovunb« 2006 S.0. 1889(E).-—1n exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following expert or professional members in the National Tiger Conservation Authority. for a period upto 3rd September, 2009 with effect from the date of publication of this notification, and for that purpose makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of lndh in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.0. 1403(E), dated the 4th September, 2006, namely :— In the said notification, for serial numbers 3 to 10 and mn‘lu relating thereto, the followifig serial numben and entries shall be substituted, namely :— y 3 “3, Prof. Madhav Gadgil - i —Member Centre for Ecological Sciences, . 3 Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore.
